title: The Desecration of Alice
description: It’s about an elderly artist and identical twin sisters that he made out of clay. As he is their creator, they do his bidding. There’s also an anti-sugar message.
quote: Yes, creator. We will do your bidding. Say the word, and we’ll spoil our blade in the flesh of your enemies.
altHero: two twin women look at each other, they are wearing long lace capes and standing in front of two windows where the white curtains move in the wind
alt1: creepy kaleidoscope shot of a nose, mouth, and many eyes
alt3: the two twins look at each other as the sheer curtains billow around them
